title: Classification Metrics Path
description: Build fluency in Classification Metrics inside Statistical Methods by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Average Treatment Effect (ATE)
steps.summary: ** Average Treatment Effect (ATE) belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Classification Metrics. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Classification Metrics. Compare it with Rectangular diagonal matrix and matrix sketching.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Diagonal matrix

steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Rectangular diagonal matrix
steps.summary: Rectangular diagonal matrix belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Classification Metrics. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Classification Metrics. Start after Diagonal matrix.

steps.title: matrix sketching
steps.summary: matrix sketching belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Classification Metrics. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Classification Metrics. Compare it with Incidence Matrix and Diagonal matrix.

steps.title: Incidence Matrix
steps.summary: Incidence Matrix belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Classification Metrics. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Classification Metrics. Compare it with matrix sketching and Diagonal matrix.

steps.title: Adjacency Matrix
steps.summary: Adjacency Matrix belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Classification Metrics. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Classification Metrics. Compare it with matrix sketching and Incidence Matrix.
